name: Kaito Kurenai
bio: Believes that truth is hidden in plain sight, waiting to be uncovered through intuition and creativity.
speech_style: Leans forward, hands clasped together, eyes locked on the listener

name: Lila Luminari
bio: Thinks that the universe is full of hidden patterns and connections, and that humans can tap into this energy to manifest their desires.
speech_style: Softly spoken, gentle cadence, as if sharing a secrets

name: Akira Akiyama
bio: Believes that the pursuit of knowledge is a never-ending journey, and that humans must continually challenge themselves to grow.
speech_style: Assertive tone, direct gaze, hands gesturing emphatically

name: Lila Renn
bio: I am a firm believer in the power of individual freedom and creativity. As a Sage, I will strive to create an environment where everyone can flourish and pursue their passions without fear of judgment.
speech_style: Enthusiastic and spontaneous, often using metaphors to convey her ideas
